business.name: My Plumbers Didsbury
business.tagline: Your Local Plumbing Experts in Didsbury

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Fantastic service from start to finish. Called in the morning about a leaking pipe and they were with us by lunchtime. Professional, tidy and very reasonably priced. Highly recommend!

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Used My Plumbers Didsbury for a full bathroom installation. The team were brilliant — great communication throughout and the finish was immaculate. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: Rachel K
sample_reviews.text: Really reliable and honest. They came out for an emergency callout on a Saturday and had the issue sorted within the hour. Fair pricing and no hidden extras.

brand.usp: My Plumbers Didsbury provides fast, reliable plumbing services to homes and businesses across South Manchester, with Gas Safe registered engineers available for emergencies seven days a week.
brand.hero_headline: Trusted Plumbers Serving Didsbury & South Manchester
brand.about_paragraph: We're My Plumbers Didsbury, your local, trusted plumbing team serving the Didsbury area and the wider South Manchester community. Whether you've got a dripping tap, a boiler that's let you down, or you're planning a brand new bathroom, we bring the same level of care and expertise to every job. We're proud to be Gas Safe registered and committed to honest pricing with no hidden surprises.
